stemHtml: In the ATC flight plan item 15, when entering a route for which standard departure (SID) and standard arrival (STAR) procedures exist…

options.a: SIDs should be entered but not STARs
options.b: Both should be entered in the ATC plan where appropriate
options.c: Neither SID nor STAR should be entered
options.d: STARs should be entered but not SIDs
